summary: Audit & Logging | Schedule | Verify page UI Elements and Navigation on Game Tile Click
gherkin:
When the user navigate to the SOP Tool homepage
And the user clicks on the "Audit & Logging" tile or from the side nav bar
And the user clicks on the Schedule page
And the user clicks on any of the game card
And !xray-attachment://db16ac78-431b-4968-825b-a01ef7aface8|width=1302,height=794!
Then the user lands on the "Audits" page
And the user should see "Audit & Logging" in the header
And the user should see "Audits" and "Schedule" tabs at the top of the page
And the page should display:
* A calendar icon with the date format "YYYY-MM-DD"
* Previous and Next arrow icons to navigate between dates
* A search box to search the game by Game PK, Teams and Venue ID
And a game card for each scheduled game containing:
* Team Names (e.g., "BOS vs TB")
* Game PK
* Venue
* Game Date
* Game Status (e.g., " SCHEDULED", "LIVE", "SUSPENDED")
And After the user clicks a game card on the schedule page, they should be taken to the Audits page, where logs for that game are shown.

steps.action:
*When* the user navigate to the SOP Tool homepage
*And* the user clicks on the "Audit & Logging" tile or from the side nav bar
*And* the user clicks on the Schedule page
*And* the user clicks on any of the game card
steps.result:
*Then* the user lands on the "Audits" page
*And* the user should see "Audit & Logging" in the header
*And* the user should see "Audits" and "Schedule" tabs at the top of the page
*And* the page should display:

* A calendar icon with the date format "YYYY-MM-DD"
* Previous and Next arrow icons to navigate between dates
* A search box to search the game by Game PK, Teams and Venue ID

*And* a game card for each scheduled game containing:

* Team Names (e.g., "BOS vs TB")
* Game PK
* Venue
* Game Date
* Game Status (e.g., " SCHEDULED", "LIVE", "SUSPENDED")

*And* After the user clicks a game card on the schedule page, they should be taken to the Audits page, where logs for that game are shown.
